data.title: Tetragon Financial Group Limited Announcement of Tender Offer to Purchase $50,000,000 of Tetragon Non-Voting Shares
data.description: On March 13, 2026, Tetragon declared the start of a tender offer to buy back some of its non-voting shares for up to $50,000,000 in cash. This offer was first revealed by Tetragon on March 5.

data.title: Michael Saylor Says Bitcoin Doesn't 'Go To The Moon' Overnight — Strategy Chair Says There's Always A 'Delay'
data.description: Strategy Inc.'s Chair, Michael Saylor, mentioned that purchasing Bitcoin (BTC) does not immediately drive up the price, emphasizing a delay between acquisition and a potential surge. This statement serves as a subtle nod to HODLers, who are urged to hold onto their assets despite market conditions. Saylor highlighted the time gap between corporate Bitcoin investments and significant price movements, humorously calling attention to the journey before Bitcoin "goes to the moon." The post received mixed responses, with some referencing Saylor's earlier unconventional stances, while others commended his unwavering stance on the matter. For further details, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Arco Vara AS Signs Share Purchase Agreement for Partial Sale of Bulgarian Subsidiary
data.description: Arco Vara AS has recently finalized a deal with Kamaleo Invest OOD, a Bulgarian company, to sell a 25% stake in Botanica Lozen EOOD. The latter is currently overseeing the development of the Botanica Lozen residential project in Sofia.

data.title: HIZENERGY Showcases Innovative C&I Energy Storage Solutions at Solar Solutions Amsterdam 2026
data.description: In the aftermath of Solar Solutions Amsterdam 2026, a significant event held in Amsterdam on March 13, 2026, HIZENERGY, a reputable company specializing in commercial and industrial (C&I) energy storage solutions, showcased their innovative self-developed PCS. This exhibition received notable attention due to the successful participation of HIZENERGY, where they highlighted their latest advancements in the field.

data.title: SOL price at $88.53, RSI 51.61 neutral. Technical analysis sees target of $100-110 by mid-2026 if $94 resistance breaks.
data.description: The current trading price of Solana is $88.53, with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) standing at a neutral 51.61. Based on technical analysis, projections indicate that the SOL price could reach between $100 to $110 by mid-2026 if it manages to break the resistance level at $94.

data.title: Cardano's ADA at $0.27 with RSI 49.84. Technicals hint at $0.45-$0.49 potential if $0.29 resistance is surpassed.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Cardano (ADA) is currently trading at $0.27, with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 49.84. Analysts predict a potential increase to the range of $0.45-$0.49 if the key resistance level at $0.29 is successfully surpassed.

data.title: Senate leader anticipates delay in passing market structure legislation until April. Focus on SAVE America Act first.
data.description: Senator John Thune has stated that the chamber plans to focus on passing the SAVE America Act before considering a vote on bipartisan legislation, such as those pertaining to the regulation of the crypto market.

data.title: BNB price expected to hit $676 resistance in late March 2026, short-term target $676, medium-term $690-$720 range.
data.description: Predictions for the price of BNB indicate a short-term target of $676 within a week. The medium-term forecast for BNB ranges between $690 and $720 over the course of a month. A bullish breakout is expected at $676.33, with critical support at $648.74.

data.title: German State Minister for Economic Affairs Visits Cabka Recycling Company in Weira
data.description: On 13 March 2026, in Amsterdam, Cabka N.V., a company and its subsidiaries focusing on converting challenging-to-recycle plastic waste into innovative Reusable Transport Packaging (RTP), became listed on Euronext Amsterdam. The visit to Cabka GmbH in Weira, Thuringia by State Minister Colette Boos-John and District Administrator Christian Herrgott aimed at exploring the circular economy's significance in sustainable industrial growth.

data.title: XRP price aims $1.46 resistance, currently at $1.41. Analysts foresee $2.80 year-end target, with potential up to $4.20 by 2026.
data.description: XRP is currently being traded at $1.41, showing a strong bullish trend. Analysis indicates a potential short-term target of $1.46, while experts foresee a price range between $2.80 and $42 by the end of 2026.

data.title: Notice of the Annual General Meeting of HMS Networks AB
data.description: Shareholders holding shares in the company HMS Networks AB (publ), with registration number 556661-8954, are cordially invited to attend the Annual General Meeting scheduled for Thursday, April 23, 2026, starting at 10:30 a.m. The location for the meeting is the HMS head office situated at Stationsgatan 37, Halmstad. Kindly note that registration for the Annual General Meeting will commence at 9:30 a.m.

data.title: Ethereum at $2,105 sees possible rally to $2,220 amid mixed signals in technical indicators and resistance at $2,160.
data.description: The current trading price of Ethereum stands at $2,105, with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) indicating a neutral stance and facing resistance at $2,160. Technical analysis indicates the possibility of a rally towards $2,220 if buyers manage to surpass the current resistance levels.
